title: Listening - Part 2
description: For each question, choose the correct answer.
instructions: You will hear six short extracts. For questions 8–13, choose the answer (A, B or C) which fits best according to what you hear.

extracts.context: You hear two people talking about a lost bag.
extracts.audio_script: Woman: Did anyone hand in your sports bag? || Man: Not yet. I thought I left it in the changing room, but it wasn't there when I went back. || Woman: Could it be on the bus? || Man: I phoned the bus company. Nothing. [8]Then I remembered putting it under the table in the café while I waited for you[/8]. I'll go there now and ask. Let's check the details again later and tell the others as well, because it will be easier if everyone knows the plan before the day.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Did anyone hand in your sports bag?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Not yet. I thought I left it in the changing room, but it wasn't there when I went back.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Could it be on the bus?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I phoned the bus company. Nothing. Then I remembered putting it under the table in the café while I waited for you. I'll go there now and ask. Let's check the details again later and tell the others as well, because it will be easier if everyone knows the plan before the day.

questions.question: Where does the man think his bag is?
questions.explanation: The man remembers putting the bag under the table in the café and plans to ask there.

extracts.context: You hear a woman talking about joining a gym.
extracts.audio_script: Speaker: I wanted to join a gym this month. The one near my house is modern, but it closes early on Fridays. Another gym has a pool, but it's across town and the buses are slow. || Speaker: [9]In the end I joined the small gym beside my office, because I can go straight after work before I get tired[/9]. It isn't the cheapest, but I think I'll use it more. Please check the information carefully and speak to a member of staff if anything is still unclear, especially if your plans have changed today.

dialogue.speaker: speaker
dialogue.text: I wanted to join a gym this month. The one near my house is modern, but it closes early on Fridays. Another gym has a pool, but it's across town and the buses are slow.

dialogue.speaker: speaker
dialogue.text: In the end I joined the small gym beside my office, because I can go straight after work before I get tired. It isn't the cheapest, but I think I'll use it more. Please check the information carefully and speak to a member of staff if anything is still unclear, especially if your plans have changed today.

questions.question: Why did the woman choose the gym beside her office?
questions.explanation: She says she joined the gym beside her office because she can go straight after work.

extracts.context: You hear two friends talking about a holiday photo.
extracts.audio_script: Man: That's a nice photo. Is it from your trip to Scotland? || Woman: Yes, from the last day. We wanted a picture by the lake, but it was too windy. || Man: So where was this taken? || Woman: [10]At the little harbour near our hotel, just before we got the boat to the island[/10]. The mountains in the background make it look more dramatic than it really was. Let's check the details again later and tell the others as well, because it will be easier if everyone knows the plan before the day.

dialogue.text: That's a nice photo. Is it from your trip to Scotland?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Yes, from the last day. We wanted a picture by the lake, but it was too windy.

dialogue.text: So where was this taken?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: At the little harbour near our hotel, just before we got the boat to the island. The mountains in the background make it look more dramatic than it really was. Let's check the details again later and tell the others as well, because it will be easier if everyone knows the plan before the day.

questions.question: Where was the photo taken?
questions.explanation: The woman says the photo was taken at the little harbour near their hotel.

extracts.context: You hear a boy talking to his mother about a school club.
extracts.audio_script: Woman: Are you going to join the drama club again this term? || Boy: I liked it, but rehearsals are on Wednesdays now, and that's when I have football practice. || Woman: What about art club? You enjoy drawing. || Boy: I do, but [11]I'm going to try the chess club because it meets at lunchtime, so it won't affect my evenings[/11]. Tom is joining too. Let's check the details again later and tell the others as well, because it will be easier if everyone knows the plan before the day.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Are you going to join the drama club again this term?

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: I liked it, but rehearsals are on Wednesdays now, and that's when I have football practice.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: What about art club? You enjoy drawing.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: I do, but I'm going to try the chess club because it meets at lunchtime, so it won't affect my evenings. Tom is joining too. Let's check the details again later and tell the others as well, because it will be easier if everyone knows the plan before the day.

questions.question: Which club will the boy join?
questions.explanation: The boy says he is going to try the chess club because it meets at lunchtime.

extracts.context: You hear two friends talking about a restaurant.
extracts.audio_script: Woman: Did you like the new restaurant in Market Street? || Man: The food was tasty, especially the pasta. The waiters were friendly too, though we had to wait a while. || Woman: Would you go back? || Man: Probably not soon. [12]The problem was the room itself; it was so noisy that we had to shout across the table[/12]. I prefer somewhere quieter for dinner. Let's check the details again later and tell the others as well, because it will be easier if everyone knows the plan before the day.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Did you like the new restaurant in Market Street?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: The food was tasty, especially the pasta. The waiters were friendly too, though we had to wait a while.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Would you go back?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Probably not soon. The problem was the room itself; it was so noisy that we had to shout across the table. I prefer somewhere quieter for dinner. Let's check the details again later and tell the others as well, because it will be easier if everyone knows the plan before the day.

questions.question: What did the man dislike about the restaurant?
questions.explanation: The man says the room was so noisy that they had to shout across the table.

extracts.context: You hear an announcement at a swimming pool.
extracts.audio_script: woman: Attention please. The children's swimming lesson at four o'clock will start ten minutes late because the instructor is arriving from another pool. The main pool remains open for public swimming. || Speaker: [13]Anyone waiting for the beginners' lesson should stay in the seating area until a member of staff calls your group[/13]. Please do not stand beside the pool edge while other swimmers are using it. Please check the information carefully and speak to a member of staff if anything is still unclear, especially if your plans have changed today.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Attention please. The children's swimming lesson at four o'clock will start ten minutes late because the instructor is arriving from another pool. The main pool remains open for public swimming.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Anyone waiting for the beginners' lesson should stay in the seating area until a member of staff calls your group. Please do not stand beside the pool edge while other swimmers are using it. Please check the information carefully and speak to a member of staff if anything is still unclear, especially if your plans have changed today.

questions.question: What should beginners do now?

options.A: start swimming in the main pool

questions.explanation: The announcement tells beginners to stay in the seating area until staff call their group.
